mapper.insert: insert into user (openid, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time) values (#{openid}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from user where create_time >= #{begin} and create_time < #{end}
select DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as value from user where create_time >= #{begin} and create_time < #{end} group by DATE(create_time) order by date
